title: Implement task and deadline tracking per matter
description: Build task creation, listing, status updates, and due-date tracking within a matter. Tasks can be assigned to matter members. Overdue tasks are visually flagged.

acceptance_criteria.text: Tasks tab on matter detail lists all tasks with status, due date, and assignee
Create task form captures title, description, due date, and assignee (matter member)
Task status can be updated inline (Todo → In Progress → Done)
Overdue tasks (past due date, not done) are visually highlighted in red
Only attorneys and paralegals can create/edit tasks; viewers see read-only

steps: Implement createTask, updateTaskStatus, deleteTask server actions
Add due date badge with overdue detection
Add assignee selector populated from matter members
Enforce RBAC: viewer role cannot mutate tasks
